body:
Structured audit for exact head bb868dc07dceb8536907b8aee115fbc765fb2b50.

```yaml
schema_version: shirube-structured-audit/v1
target_repo: watchout/agent-comms-mcp
target_pr: 813
exact_head_sha: bb868dc07dceb8536907b8aee115fbc765fb2b50
pr_head_sha: bb868dc07dceb8536907b8aee115fbc765fb2b50
audit_checklist_ref: test/fixtures/shirube/audit-checklist/checklist.pass.yaml
reviewer_actor: codex-audit
reviewer_model: gpt-5-audit
implementation_actor: codex-adf
items:
  - item_id: AUDIT-001
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - structured-review-notes
    confidence: high
    notes: Checklist generation is covered by structured review.
  - item_id: AUDIT-002
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - changed_files
    confidence: high
    notes: No stop condition observed.
  - item_id: AUDIT-003
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - diff_scope_report
    confidence: high
    notes: Diff stays within allowed paths.
  - item_id: AUDIT-004
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - diff_scope_report
    confidence: high
    notes: Forbidden paths are untouched.
  - item_id: AUDIT-005
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - protected_surface_declaration
    confidence: high
    notes: Protected surface handling is declared.
  - item_id: AUDIT-006
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - command_result:npm run test -- test/shirube/audit-checklist.test.ts
    confidence: high
    notes: Focused tests passed.
  - item_id: AUDIT-007
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - pr_head_sha
    confidence: high
    notes: Exact head evidence is present.
  - item_id: AUDIT-008
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - validation_results
    confidence: high
    notes: Validation results are present.
  - item_id: AUDIT-009
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - maker_checker_review
    confidence: high
    notes: Reviewer differs from implementation actor.
  - item_id: AUDIT-010
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - owner_decision
    confidence: high
    notes: Owner decision remains separate from audit evidence.
  - item_id: AUDIT-011
    result: PASS
    evidence_refs:
      - post_merge_evidence
    confidence: high
    notes: Post-merge evidence policy exists.
```

Audit verification comment: https://github.com/watchout/agent-comms-mcp/pull/813#issuecomment-4796262737
